'''''Voyages SF'' 11''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1990]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[A Day at the Auction]]" and was written and illustrated by [[James B. King]].
